f461dd76-c418-4de5-bd49-77f26287e3a1.text:
## Role Summary
You will join our Tech team as a Backend Engineer, owning the design and delivery of features on our microservices-based architecture, working closely with internal stakeholders and external vendors to drive business outcomes. As a key member of the team, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams, including frontend engineers, QA engineers, and business analysts, to ensure seamless integration of backend services with the overall product. Your primary focus will be on developing scalable, efficient, and reliable backend systems that support the growth of our business. You will work on a range of projects, from building new REST APIs to optimizing database performance, and contribute to the technical roadmap of the company.

## Key Responsibilities
* Design and implement new backend features and services using Java, Node.js, or Python, ensuring they meet the required quality, scalability, and performance standards.
* Develop and maintain RESTful APIs, using tools like Swagger or API Gateway, to expose backend services to frontend applications and external integrations.
* Coordinate with database administrators to design and optimize database schemas, ensuring data consistency, integrity, and performance, using SQL and NoSQL databases like MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB.
* Collaborate with frontend engineers to integrate backend services with web and mobile applications, using protocols like HTTP, WebSocket, or gRPC.
* Participate in code reviews, ensuring that the code is maintainable, efficient, and follows industry best practices, and provide constructive feedback to junior engineers.
* Own and troubleshoot issues in the production environment, using tools like Docker, Kubernetes, or monitoring systems like Prometheus or Grafana.
* Contribute to the development of technical documentation, including API documentation, system design documents, and technical guides.
* Work with the QA team to develop automated tests, using frameworks like JUnit, PyUnit, or Unittest, to ensure the quality and reliability of backend services.

## Must-Have Skills
* Java (Spring Boot, Hibernate) — building scalable and efficient backend services, with expertise in dependency injection, AOP, and transaction management.
* Node.js (Express.js, Koa.js) — developing RESTful APIs, real-time applications, and microservices, using npm, yarn, or pnpm for package management.
* Python (Flask, Django) — building data-driven applications, web services, and data pipelines, using pip, virtualenv, or conda for package management.
* REST API design — designing and implementing APIs using HTTP, JSON, and other protocols, with expertise in API security, authentication, and authorization.
* Database design (SQL + NoSQL) — designing and optimizing database schemas, using ER diagrams, normalization, and denormalization techniques, with expertise in query optimization, indexing, and caching.
* Microservices architecture — designing and implementing microservices-based systems, using service discovery, load balancing, and circuit breakers, with expertise in containerization, orchestration, and monitoring.

## Good to Have
* Experience with containerization using Docker, Kubernetes, or container orchestration tools like Helm or Skaffold.
* Knowledge of cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud, with expertise in cloud-native services, serverless computing, and cloud security.
* Familiarity with message queues like RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka, or Amazon SQS, with expertise in message processing, event-driven architecture, and stream processing.
* Certification in Java, Node.js, or Python, with expertise in programming languages, software development methodologies, and technical leadership.
* Experience with API gateways like NGINX, AWS API Gateway, or Google Cloud Endpoints, with expertise in API security, authentication, and rate limiting.

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work on a range of projects, from building new backend services to optimizing existing systems, using a tech stack that includes Java, Node.js, Python, and a range of databases and messaging systems.
* Collaborative and dynamic work environment, with a strong focus on learning and development, and opportunities for cross-functional exposure and career growth.
* Access to cutting-edge technologies and tools, with a budget for training and professional development, and a culture that encourages innovation, experimentation, and continuous improvement.
* A chance to work with a talented team of engineers, designers, and product managers, who are passionate about building high-quality products and services that make a real impact on the business.

18c4d7d5-8d5e-46a8-b411-3c98676e51d1.text:
## Role Summary
As a Data Analyst at Arvind Limited GCC, you will own the development and maintenance of data models, reports, and insights that drive business decisions and optimize operations. You will work closely with internal teams, such as business stakeholders and IT, to identify data requirements and deliver insights that inform strategic initiatives. Your work will have a direct impact on the business, enabling data-driven decision-making and process optimization in the textile, retail, and diversified industries. You will be an integral part of the Tech team, collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive business outcomes.

## Key Responsibilities
* Assist in designing and developing statistical models using Python and R to solve complex business problems.
* Execute data preprocessing, feature engineering, and data visualization tasks using Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib.
* Support the deployment of machine learning models to production environments using tools such as Docker and Kubernetes.
* Contribute to the development of experiment design and A-B testing frameworks to measure model effectiveness.
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver data insights that meet their needs.
* Learn and implement new tools and methodologies to improve data analysis and reporting processes.
* Execute data quality checks and data validation tasks to ensure accuracy and reliability of insights.

## Must-Have Skills
* Python (pandas, NumPy) — data wrangling, feature engineering, EDA, and data visualization.
* R — statistical modeling, data analysis, and data visualization.
* Statistical modelling — hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, and regression analysis.
* ML algorithms — supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, and deep learning.
* Model deployment — deploying models to production environments using tools such as Docker.
* Pandas / NumPy — data manipulation, analysis, and visualization.

## Good to Have
* Experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or D3.js.
* Knowledge of cloud-based data platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.
* Familiarity with agile development methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban.
* Certification in data science or a related field, such as Certified Data Scientist (CDS) or Certified Analytics Professional (CAP).

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work on complex business problems and develop data-driven solutions that drive real business value in the textile, retail, and diversified industries.
* Access to cutting-edge technologies and tools, including Python, R, ML algorithms, and cloud-based data platforms.
* Collaborative and dynamic work environment with a team of experienced data analysts and scientists, with opportunities for cross-functional exposure and learning.
* Opportunities for learning and development, including training and certification programs, to help you advance your career in data science.

b71f4d92-dc5e-46dc-956f-eff2bff4ee11.text:
## Role Summary
You will own the design, implementation, and maintenance of network infrastructure at Arvind GCC, working closely with the Tech team to ensure seamless operations and high-quality IT services to internal stakeholders. As a Network Engineer, you will collaborate with business stakeholders to understand their requirements and provide tailored solutions, driving business outcomes through effective network management. You will be part of a team that supports the technology and business-services centre, enabling Arvind Limited's textile, retail, and diversified businesses. Your expertise will be crucial in maintaining the uptime and performance of our network systems, ensuring that our business can operate efficiently.

## Key Responsibilities
* Deliver high-quality network services to internal stakeholders, ensuring timely resolution of incidents and requests through ITSM tools like ServiceNow or Jira Service.
* Troubleshoot and resolve network-related issues, applying your knowledge of TCP/IP, DNS, and DHCP to ensure seamless connectivity across the organization.
* Coordinate with the cybersecurity team to implement network security measures, such as firewalls and access controls, to protect our network from threats.
* Own the management of network devices, including routers, switches, and firewalls, to ensure they are properly configured and maintained.
* Collaborate with the cloud team to design and implement cloud-based network architectures, such as Azure or AWS, to support our business needs.
* Improve existing network processes and procedures, identifying areas for automation and implementing changes to increase efficiency.
* Review and provide feedback on network designs and implementations to ensure they meet our business requirements and follow best practices.

## Must-Have Skills
* ITSM tools (ServiceNow / Jira Service) — incident, problem, and change management
* Hardware & OS troubleshooting — Windows, Linux, and macOS operating systems
* Active Directory / Azure AD — user and group management, authentication, and authorization
* Networking basics (TCP/IP / DNS / DHCP) — network configuration, troubleshooting, and optimization
* SLA management — service level agreement creation, monitoring, and reporting
* Cisco networking devices (routers, switches, firewalls) — configuration, maintenance, and troubleshooting
* Network monitoring tools (Nagios, SolarWinds) — monitoring network performance and detecting issues

## Good to Have
* CompTIA Network+ or equivalent certification — demonstrating expertise in network fundamentals and protocols
* Experience with network automation tools (Ansible, Python) — automating network tasks and improving efficiency
* Knowledge of cloud-based network services (Azure Network, AWS VPC) — designing and implementing cloud-based network architectures
* Familiarity with cybersecurity frameworks and compliance standards (NIST, ISO 27001) — ensuring network security and compliance

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work with a cutting-edge technology stack, including cloud-based services and emerging technologies, to support our business growth and innovation.
* A dynamic and supportive work environment, with opportunities for cross-functional exposure and collaboration with other teams, such as cybersecurity and cloud engineering.
* A clear path for learning and development, with training and certification programs to help you grow your skills and expertise in network engineering and related areas.
* The chance to work on complex business problems, applying your technical expertise to drive business outcomes and make a real impact on the organization.

68cdae82-9eb0-4d20-b08f-6a4ff3596207.text:
## Role Summary
You will own the end-to-end Record to Report (R2R) operations for Arvind Limited's GCC, driving accurate and timely financial close. You will work closely with internal stakeholders, including the finance controller, senior managers, and external auditors to ensure compliance with IFRS/US GAAP standards. As an R2R Operations Analyst, you will drive business outcomes by providing high-quality financial data and insights to support informed decision-making. Your work will be grounded in the GCC/Finance context, focusing on financial modelling, budgeting, and forecasting.

## Key Responsibilities
* Deliver high-quality financial reports, including balance sheets, profit and loss statements, and cash flow statements, using Excel and Power BI.
* Build and maintain financial models to forecast revenue, expenses, and profitability, collaborating with business analysts to translate KPI requirements into report specifications.
* Own the preparation of variance analysis reports, identifying areas of discrepancy and providing recommendations for improvement.
* Coordinate with internal teams, including AP, AR, and FP&A, to ensure accurate and timely financial data.
* Improve existing financial processes and procedures, implementing best practices and standardizing workflows.
* Develop and maintain management reports, including dashboards and scorecards, to track key financial metrics.
* Review and validate financial data for accuracy and completeness, ensuring compliance with internal controls and regulatory requirements.
* Collaborate with external auditors to ensure seamless audit processes and address any audit findings or recommendations.

## Must-Have Skills
* Excel — financial modelling, data analysis, and reporting
* Power BI — building enterprise dashboards, creating DAX measures, and implementing row-level security
* Financial modelling — forecasting revenue, expenses, and profitability
* Budgeting & forecasting — developing and managing budgets, forecasting financial performance
* Variance analysis — identifying areas of discrepancy and providing recommendations for improvement
* Management reporting — developing and maintaining reports, including dashboards and scorecards
* P&L / Balance sheet understanding — analyzing and interpreting financial statements

## Good to Have
* Certification in financial planning and analysis (FP&A) or a related field
* Experience with financial planning software, such as Anaplan or Adaptive Insights
* Knowledge of accounting standards, including IFRS and US GAAP
* Familiarity with data visualization tools, such as Tableau or QlikView
* Experience with process improvement methodologies, such as Lean or Six Sigma

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work with a complex and scalable financial system, using cutting-edge technology, including SAP and Oracle
* A collaborative and dynamic work environment, with cross-functional exposure to various business units and stakeholders
* Access to learning and development programs, including Arvind University and Samarth, to enhance your skills and knowledge
* A chance to work on high-impact projects, driving business outcomes and making a meaningful contribution to the organization's growth and success

570f3d9f-33c8-406b-ab86-25a7897f4a68.text:
## Role Summary
You will own the development and maintenance of Power BI reports and dashboards for Arvind Limited's GCC, driving business outcomes through data-driven insights. You will work closely with internal teams, including business stakeholders, to identify reporting requirements and deliver actionable recommendations. As a Power BI Analyst, you will play a key role in enhancing the organization's business intelligence capabilities, focusing on manufacturing and retail operations. You will be based in our Ahmedabad office, working within the IT department to support informed decision-making across the organization.

## Key Responsibilities
* Deliver Power BI reports and dashboards that meet business stakeholders' requirements, using DAX measures, data modeling, and visualization techniques.
* Build and maintain datasets to support business intelligence initiatives, leveraging Power Query (M) and SQL (query-only) to ensure data accuracy and integrity.
* Coordinate with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and develop targeted data visualizations, addressing specific business needs and questions.
* Improve report performance by optimizing data queries, DAX formulas, and Power BI configuration, ensuring seamless user experience.
* Develop and maintain documentation for all reports and datasets, outlining data sources, methodology, and intended audience to ensure transparency and reuse.
* Collaborate with junior team members to review their work, provide feedback, and ensure adherence to reporting standards and best practices.
* Own the deployment and management of Power BI reports and dashboards, using Power BI Service & Gateway to ensure secure and scalable distribution.

## Must-Have Skills
* DAX — writing measures, calculations, and data modeling for Power BI reports
* Power Query (M) — data transformation, loading, and manipulation for reporting purposes
* Data modelling / star schema — designing and implementing data models for reporting and analysis
* Power BI Service & Gateway — deploying, managing, and securing Power BI reports and dashboards
* SQL (query-only) — writing queries for data extraction, filtering, and aggregation
* Stakeholder reporting — communicating insights and recommendations to business stakeholders through reports and presentations

## Good to Have
* PL-300 certification — demonstrating expertise in Power BI and data analysis
* Experience with Power BI mobile layout design — enabling seamless user experience across devices
* Knowledge of data pipeline management — including deployment pipelines and data governance
* Familiarity with manufacturing or retail domain — understanding key performance indicators and business operations

## What We Offer
* Opportunity to work with a cutting-edge technology stack, including Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, and SQL
* Exposure to large-scale business problems and complex data sets, with the chance to drive real business impact
* Collaborative and dynamic work environment, with cross-functional teams and stakeholders
* Access to learning and development opportunities, including training and certification programs, to enhance your skills and career growth

1705d02d-dbb1-4065-a3ef-9aa6c09b04fe.text:
## Role Summary
You will own the day-to-day operations of our manufacturing plant, working closely with internal teams such as production planning, quality control, and maintenance to ensure seamless execution of production schedules. As an Operations professional at Arvind Limited GCC, you will collaborate with external vendors and business stakeholders to drive business outcomes, including on-time delivery, quality standards, and cost optimization. Your primary focus will be on managing the production floor, leveraging Lean and Six Sigma principles to optimize processes and improve overall equipment effectiveness (OEE). You will be based at our manufacturing facility, where you will work onsite to ensure the smooth operation of our production lines.

## Key Responsibilities
* Assist in production planning and scheduling, using tools like ERP and scheduling software to optimize production runs and minimize downtime.
* Support the implementation of Lean and Six Sigma tools, such as Kaizen events and DMAIC methodologies, to identify and eliminate waste in our processes.
* Execute OEE monitoring and analysis, using data to identify areas for improvement and implement corrective actions to optimize equipment performance.
* Contribute to workforce and shift management, ensuring that our production teams are adequately staffed and trained to meet production targets.
* Collaborate with the quality control team to ensure that our products meet the required quality standards, and implement corrective actions when necessary.
* Learn and adhere to safety (EHS) compliance protocols, ensuring a safe working environment for all employees and visitors to our manufacturing facility.
* Participate in continuous improvement initiatives, providing input and suggestions for process improvements and implementing changes as directed by senior team members.

## Must-Have Skills
* Production planning and scheduling — using ERP and scheduling software to optimize production runs.
* Lean / Six Sigma tools — implementing Kaizen events, DMAIC methodologies, and other continuous improvement techniques.
* OEE monitoring — using data to identify areas for improvement and optimize equipment performance.
* Workforce and shift management — ensuring adequate staffing and training of production teams.
* Safety (EHS) compliance — adhering to protocols and ensuring a safe working environment.
* Microsoft Office — using Excel, Word, and PowerPoint to create reports, documents, and presentations.

## Good to Have
* Knowledge of Arvind plant operations at Kalol/Naroda/Santej — familiarity with our manufacturing facilities and processes.
* Certification in Lean or Six Sigma methodologies — demonstrating expertise in continuous improvement techniques.
* Experience with manufacturing execution systems (MES) — using software to track and manage production processes.
* Familiarity with ISO 9001 or other quality management standards — understanding of quality management principles and practices.

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work with a leading manufacturer, using cutting-edge technology and processes to drive business outcomes.
* A comprehensive learning and development program, including training and certification opportunities in Lean and Six Sigma methodologies.
* Cross-functional exposure to various departments, including production planning, quality control, and maintenance.
* A dynamic and supportive work environment, with a focus on continuous improvement and employee growth and development.

d9540827-797f-4785-b14a-ee88d243cb3d.text:
## Role Summary
You will own the quality assurance process for Arvind Limited's textile manufacturing operations, working closely with internal teams such as production, supply chain, and external vendors to ensure compliance with international quality standards. As a QA manager, you will drive business outcomes by implementing and maintaining quality management systems, conducting inline and final inspections, and managing customer audits. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and mitigate quality risks, and report quality KPIs to senior leadership. Your work will have a direct impact on the quality of Arvind's textile products and the satisfaction of its global customers.

## Key Responsibilities
* Lead the implementation and maintenance of quality management systems, including ISO 9001 and SA8000, to ensure compliance with international standards.
* Conduct inline and final inspections using AQL sampling methods to ensure products meet quality standards.
* Perform root cause analysis using 8D and Ishikawa methodologies to identify and address quality issues.
* Manage customer audits, including preparation, execution, and follow-up, to ensure compliance with customer quality requirements.
* Develop and report quality KPIs, including defect rates, inspection results, and customer satisfaction metrics.
* Collaborate with production teams to identify and mitigate quality risks, and implement corrective actions.
* Mentor junior quality team members to develop their skills and knowledge of quality management systems and methodologies.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance quality processes and reduce defects.

## Must-Have Skills
* Quality management systems (ISO 9001 / SA8000) — implementation, maintenance, and auditing.
* Inline & final inspection (AQL sampling) — sampling methods, defect classification, and inspection reporting.
* Root cause analysis (8D / Ishikawa) — problem-solving, root cause identification, and corrective action implementation.
* Customer audit management — audit preparation, execution, and follow-up, including communication with customers and internal stakeholders.
* Quality KPI reporting — data analysis, metrics development, and reporting to senior leadership.
* AQL sampling and defect classification — understanding of sampling methods, defect classification, and inspection reporting.

## Good to Have
* Six Sigma Green Belt or Black Belt certification — process improvement, waste reduction, and quality enhancement.
* Experience with third-party lab accreditation, such as SGS, Bureau Veritas, or Intertek — lab management, testing, and certification.
* Knowledge of chemical testing and restricted substances lists (RSL/MRSL) — testing, analysis, and compliance.
* Familiarity with quality management software, such as SAP QM or Oracle Quality — quality data management, reporting, and analysis.
* Certification in OEKO-TEX 100, GOTS, or Bluesign — sustainable textile production, environmental responsibility, and social accountability.

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work with a leading textile manufacturer and contribute to the quality of its products and the satisfaction of its global customers.
* Exposure to a range of quality management systems, methodologies, and tools, including ISO 9001, SA8000, AQL sampling, and root cause analysis.
* Collaborative and dynamic work environment with cross-functional teams, including production, supply chain, and sales.
* Professional development and growth opportunities, including training, mentorship, and certification programs.
* The chance to work with a variety of customers and stakeholders, including international brands and retailers, and to develop a deep understanding of their quality requirements and expectations.

f5b3f1a0-30e6-451e-9978-e799e3cb3399.text:
## Role Summary
You will own end-to-end recruiting for various business units within Arvind Limited GCC, managing a portfolio of 10-15 open roles at a time. You will partner directly with hiring managers and stakeholders to understand role requirements, develop job descriptions, and source top talent. As a Talent Acquisition Specialist, you will drive business outcomes by ensuring timely and high-quality hiring, ultimately contributing to the growth and success of Arvind Limited's textile, retail, and diversified businesses. You will work closely with the HR team and external vendors to achieve these goals.

## Key Responsibilities
* Manage full-cycle recruiting for various roles, including job posting, candidate sourcing, screening, and selection, using tools like Naukri and LinkedIn Recruiter.
* Develop and maintain talent pipelines for recurring role types, keeping passive candidates warm through regular outreach and engagement.
* Coordinate interview schedules with hiring managers and candidates, ensuring a seamless and efficient interview process.
* Build and maintain relationships with external vendors, such as recruitment agencies and job boards, to ensure effective talent sourcing.
* Own offer preparation and negotiation, coordinating with the Compensation team for benchmarking data and ensuring competitive offers.
* Track and report on recruitment metrics, such as time-to-fill, offer acceptance rate, and source mix, to inform recruitment strategies and improve processes.
* Collaborate with the HR team to develop and implement employer branding initiatives, including job description reviews and social media content.

## Must-Have Skills
* Naukri — job posting and candidate sourcing
* LinkedIn Recruiter — proactive sourcing and candidate outreach
* ATS (Applicant Tracking System) — managing candidate applications and workflows
* JD writing — developing job descriptions and requirements
* Candidate screening — assessing candidate resumes and cover letters
* Stakeholder management — partnering with hiring managers and stakeholders to understand role requirements

## Good to Have
* Experience with recruitment marketing tools, such as Gem or Beamery, for multi-touch outreach sequences
* Knowledge of niche textile roles, such as Colorist or Loom Technician, and experience recruiting for similar positions
* Certification in recruitment or HR, such as SHRM-CP or PHR, demonstrating expertise in recruitment principles and practices
* Experience with data analysis and reporting, using tools like Excel or Tableau, to inform recruitment strategies and improve processes

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work with a diverse range of business units and roles, developing a deep understanding of Arvind Limited's businesses and talent needs.
* Exposure to a cutting-edge technology stack, including Naukri and LinkedIn Recruiter, and the chance to develop expertise in these tools.
* A collaborative and dynamic work environment, with opportunities for cross-functional exposure and learning and development paths.
* The chance to contribute to the growth and success of Arvind Limited, a leading textile and retail company, and make a meaningful impact on the business.

5ea745ed-c6c5-4445-a0fe-4f4198558127.text:
## Role Summary
You will drive enterprise sales growth for Arvind Limited's GCC (Global Capability Centre) in the Telecom division, owning key account management and revenue growth across corporate and government clients. You will work closely with internal teams such as sales engineering, marketing, and customer success to identify new business opportunities and build strong relationships with external stakeholders. Your primary focus will be on delivering revenue and quota achievement, driving commercial negotiation, and sales forecasting to meet business objectives.

## Key Responsibilities
* Lead the end-to-end sales lifecycle for enterprise clients, from lead generation to closure, using CRM tools like Salesforce to track and manage sales performance.
* Drive commercial negotiation with clients to achieve revenue and quota targets, leveraging market research and competitor analysis to inform sales strategies.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers at corporate and government clients, identifying new business opportunities and upselling existing solutions.
* Collaborate with sales engineering teams to demonstrate product capabilities and develop customized solutions for clients.
* Analyze sales data and market trends to inform sales forecasting and identify areas for improvement, using tools like Tableau or Power BI to create data-driven insights.
* Mentor junior sales team members to improve sales performance and achieve team targets, providing coaching and guidance on sales strategies and techniques.
* Define and execute account plans to achieve revenue growth and expand existing relationships, using tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator to identify new contacts and opportunities.

## Must-Have Skills
* Salesforce (CRM) — managing sales pipeline, tracking customer interactions, and analyzing sales performance.
* Commercial negotiation — negotiating contracts, pricing, and terms with clients.
* Customer Relationship Management (CRM) — building and maintaining strong relationships with clients.
* Sales forecasting — analyzing sales data and market trends to predict future sales performance.
* Revenue and quota achievement — driving sales growth and achieving revenue targets.
* Key account management — managing and growing existing client relationships.

## Good to Have
* Experience with telecom industry solutions, such as network infrastructure or cloud services.
* Knowledge of sales enablement tools, such as Showpad or Bigtincan.
* Certification in sales methodologies, such as SPIN selling or Challenger sales.
* Familiarity with data analytics tools, such as Excel or SQL, to analyze sales data and inform sales strategies.

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work with a leading telecom company, driving sales growth and revenue achievement in a dynamic and fast-paced environment.
* Exposure to a wide range of clients and industries, from corporate to government, and the chance to build strong relationships with key decision-makers.
* Access to cutting-edge sales tools and technologies, including CRM, sales enablement, and data analytics platforms.
* Opportunities for professional development and growth, including training and mentorship programs to help you achieve your career goals.
